pi_items.source: task.json instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly specify 'NOC Legacy View'
task.json explicit instructions and verifier.py lowercased matching strings
task.json description states 'You are a Network Operations Center (NOC) Manager'
task.json does not mention Telecommunications; it could be any IT or Tech context. The industry is implicit at best, but unverified.
export_result.sh saves SQLite DB dump and writes result to this path; verifier reads it from this path

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world time-series data from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB), which contains actual AWS EC2 CloudWatch metrics (CPU, disk, network) and server temperatures. A custom python script feeds this real data into Graphite. The required dashboard name 'NOC Legacy View' and the three required graph titles ('CPU Utilization (Cacti)', 'Traffic & I/O (Styled)', 'Temperature with Baseline') exactly match the explicit task description instructions and the scoring checks in verifier.py.
